name: discord-whitelist-bot
author: muzlik
description: Discord bot for Minecraft whitelist management

scripts.setup: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('./config.json')){require('fs').copyFileSync('./config.example.json','./config.json');console.log('Created config.json from example. Edit it with your token and clientId.');}else{console.log('config.json already exists.');}"
scripts.postinstall:
node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('./config.json')){console.log('
=== IMPORTANT ===
Create config.json from config.example.json with your Discord bot token and clientId.
=================
');}"
